12th year.
Mer.
The native will gain
parental property including lands.
He will have knowledge of religious Sat. Ketu
scriptures and will be charitable by
nature.
His sisters will all be happy.
He will purchase a built house. He will involve himself
in court matters and- sell away the house for meeting the
legal expenses for the cases 'in which he is involved-all
caused by a so, called friend. He will live upto a middle age of
58-60 years.

22 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
CHART 13
Jupiter, the life propeller is in
Sat.
Sun Mer. Rahu the house ofMars, and Ketu occupies
' Venus the 2nd house to him. So the native
Mars was born to a cultivator. The native
Moon will follow some great people as Mars_
transits Jupiter first. He will win over
all enemies-His. brothers and sisters
will have to face some trouble (Mars
and the Moon next to Rahu). The Sun
Ketu Jupt has Saturn and Venus in the next
house.
